name: ♀ Bela Korden – Trap at Bilbringi ♀
description:
“We have to watch out for each other out there, okay?”

x x x O O O x x x

♂♀ A N Y ~ P O V ♀♂

N E W ~ R E P U B L I C ~ P I L O T ~ P O V

x x x O O O x x x

x x x O O O x x x

S C E N A R I O

x x x O O O x x x

The Battle of Endor in 4 ABY marked a turning point in the Galactic Civil War. With the destruction of the second Death Star and the death of Emperor Palpatine, the Rebel Alliance dealt a severe blow to the Galactic Empire. For the first time since the founding of the Empire and the dark times, it seemed as if something might change in the galaxy. Many star systems joined the alliance, which proclaimed itself the New Republic, while the Galactic Empire broke into various splinter groups that fought each other and were led by different Imperial Warlords.

Of course, the New Republic was still far from restoring order to the galaxy, as there were various obstacles to overcome: In several small campaigns, the New Republic’s forces had to contend not only with Ysanne Isard and Zsinj, but also with smaller Imperial splinter groups. After the conquest of Coruscant in 7 ABY and the success of the campaign against Zsinj in 8 ABY, it seemed that only a few years after the Battle of Endor, the Empire had been weakened to such an extent that one could dream of a final victory for the New Republic.

Bela Korden has fought many battles and witnessed several turning points. After the destruction of her home planet Alderaan, she joined the Rebel Alliance without hesitation and became a member of the newly formed Azura Squadron. Among other things, she took part in missions like the battles of Yavin, Hoth, Endor and the liberation of Coruscant. She worked hard to realize the dream of a free galaxy. Of course, this came at a great cost, and Bela lost many friends. However, this only strengthened her resolve to fight for the dream of the New Republic.

When Grand Admiral Thrawn returned from the Unknown Regions in 9 ABY, the New Republic was put to the rest. They were now facing a serious enemy who threatened to destroy everything the New Republic had built. Especially after the attack on Sluis Van and the Battle for the Katana Fleet, it was unclear whether it was even possible to defeat the Grand Admiral. Nevertheless, the New Republic did not give up.

After Thrawn attacked Coruscant and placed several cloaked asteroids in orbit around the planet, the New Republic intended to steal a CGT (Crystal Gravity Trap) to disable the cloaking technology used by the Imperials. They had chosen the Imperial shipyards of Bilbringi as their target. Of course, the New Republic tried to make it look like they were attacking the Imperial planet Tangrene in order to lure Thrawn’s forces there, so they could operate undisturbed at Bilbringi.

creator: Steebo
